proxy_scope.target_company_context: Aggregate Korean freight (industry-agnostic) — public OD data; not a representation of any single company
proxy_scope.disclaimer: This analysis is generated from public Korean Freight O/D aggregate data and does not represent any individual company or industry. The engine demonstrates the analysis architecture; replacing the input with enterprise shipment data is required before using any numbers for CAPEX or operational decisions.

warnings: Imputed product family based on region heuristic.

notes: Segmentation applied using Group C playbook.

diagnosis.network_health_summary: Network is generally healthy but GG_METRO overloads in Q4.

scenarios.managerial_interpretation: Optimal balance of cost and service.

recommended_network.recommendation_summary: Move to 4 hubs to balance cost.

seasonal_playbook.risk: Last-mile delivery delays and SLA breach risk during M01 parcel-volume surge
recommended_actions: Add temporary 3PL contracts for last-mile delivery
Shift handling staff +20% during the event window
Stage parcels closer to demand centroids
Scale last-mile rider/courier pools for the window

seasonal_playbook.risk: Capacity overflow at affected hubs during M02-M03 high-velocity launch wave
recommended_actions: Pre-position 30% inventory 2 weeks early
Activate flex capacity at affected hubs
Negotiate temporary 3PL overflow contracts
Coordinate inbound with manufacturer release calendar
Add 3PL overflow contract at GG_METRO (gap ≈ 2400 tons)

seasonal_playbook.risk: Storage shortage for bulky inventory during M07-M08 bulky storage-intensive flow
recommended_actions: Lease overflow yard within 30 km of the affected hub
Cross-dock directly from port / supplier when possible
Reduce safety stock days for slow-moving SKUs
Pre-clear floor space at receiving hubs 2 weeks ahead

seasonal_playbook.risk: General demand spike requiring flex operations during M09 mixed cargo seasonal swing
recommended_actions: Increase inbound receiving slot capacity by 25%
Pre-build picking waves the night before

seasonal_playbook.risk: General demand spike requiring flex operations during M11 finished-goods replenishment cycle
recommended_actions: Increase inbound receiving slot capacity by 25%
Pre-build picking waves the night before
Sync inbound receiving slots with downstream PO calendar

seasonal_playbook.risk: Elevated theft / loss risk on high-value goods during M12 high-value secure shipment surge
recommended_actions: Route shipments through secure_node hubs only
Increase guarded transit checkpoints
Add insurance rider for the event window
Audit chain of custody through secure_node hubs
